header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Organization & Talent Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.
